props.title: New Article: MiroShark Grew a Brain — The Weekend a Simulator Became a Knowledge Graph

props.text: Sunday night's direct push landed an 11-capability graph memory stack (BGE reranker, bi-temporal edges, Leiden community clustering, MCP server at `backend/mcp_server.py`) — the Hindsight/Graphiti/Letta/HippoRAG playbook compressed into 17 files. Monday's PR #41 siphoned 14 opt-in features home from four sibling forks (Nash equilibrium via nashpy, counterfactual branching, per-agent MCP tools) and stood up the project's first CI test suite. MiroShark stopped being a simulator and started being a research substrate.

props.title: MiroShark Grew a Brain — The Weekend a Simulator Became a Knowledge Graph
